# Bundle Contents - Safe for Customer Distribution

Your customer receives **ONLY:**

- ✅ Compiled executable (`ethical_assistant_demo` - 13MB)
- ✅ Launch script (`run_recorder.sh`)
- ✅ React UI (`demo_hybrid/recorder-ui/`)
- ✅ .NET Backend API (`demo_hybrid/RecorderBridge.Api/`)
- ✅ Helper scripts (`transcribe.sh`)
- ✅ Configuration files
- Bundle Structure

```
ethical_assistant_cpp_demo_bundle/
├── ethical_assistant_demo          ← Compiled executable (13MB)
├── run_recorder.sh                 ← Launcher script
├── SETUP_FOR_CUSTOMERS.txt         ← Instructions for customer
├── transcribe.sh                   ← Audio transcription helper
├── demo_hybrid/
│   ├── recorder-ui/               ← React UI (built)
│   └── RecorderBridge.Api/        ← .NET backend
├── scripts/                        ← Support scripts
└── config/                         ← Configuration
```

## What Your Customer Can Do

✓ Run the recorder app
✓ Use the React dashboard
✓ Record audio
✓ Transcribe recordings
✓ Chat with Gemini AI
✓ Export chat history


**Bundles are production-ready and confidential. Safe to share with customers.**
